## Knowledge Base Results for "I2C bus setup"

### SCPI Commands
- **SOUrce** (public/commands/MSO_DPO_5k_7k_70K.json)
  Command: BUS:B<x>:I2C:DATa:SOUrce Description: This command sets or queries the I2C data (SDA) source for the specified I2C bus. Category: Bus
- **Source** (public/commands/mso_2_4_5_6_7.json)
  Command: BUS:B<x>:I2C:DATa:SOUrce Description: This command sets or queries the I2C data (SDA) source for the specified I2C bus. The bus is specified 
- **SOUrce** (public/commands/MSO_DPO_5k_7k_70K.json)
  Command: BUS:B<x>:I2C:CLOCk:SOUrce Description: This command sets or queries the I2C clock (SCLK) source for the specified bus. Category: Bus

### PyVISA/TekHSI
- **PyVISA Resource Manager Setup** (AI_RAG/corpus/pyvisa_tekhsi/pyvisa_tekhsi_index.json)
  The ResourceManager is the entry point for all PyVISA operations. Create it with pyvisa.ResourceManager(). By default, it uses the system VISA library
- **When NOT to Use TekHSI — Measurements, Search, SCPI** (AI_RAG/corpus/pyvisa_tekhsi/pyvisa_tekhsi_index.json)
  DO NOT use TekHSI for: 1) Instrument configuration (CH1:SCALE, HORizontal:SCALE, etc.), 2) Trigger setup, 3) Measurements (MEASUrement:ADDMEAS, MEASUr
- **Hybrid Backend: Mixed Operations — Same Workflow, Different Backends** (AI_RAG/corpus/pyvisa_tekhsi/pyvisa_tekhsi_index.json)
